---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Grants & Awards – Pedro Masi"
---

## Grants

::: {.paper-entry}
**AI Tennessee Initiative Seed Grant** — Collaborator

Research on Artificial Intelligence and the Future of Work; supervised master's students and contributed to research design and dashboard-based data visualization.

[Project Website](https://ai.haslam.utk.edu/future-of-work/)
:::

### Master's Student Feedback

> "Pedro is very insightful and has helped me to improve my analytics abilities greatly during my time with this research project. Very glad I was able to be a part of it." 

> "Pedro is super accessible and does a good job at guiding efforts without over managing them." 

> "Pedro is very kind and is a key part of the team atmosphere being open and enjoyable." 

---

## Awards & Scholarships

::: {.paper-entry}
**Graduate Research Award** — Americas Conference on Information Systems (AMCIS), August 2026
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
**Graduate Research Award** — DePaul Doctoral/Junior Faculty Research Symposium, March 2026
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
**Haslam College of Business Travel Award** — Workshop on Information Technologies and Systems (WITS), October 2025
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
**Graduate Student Senate Award** — Conference on Information Systems and Technology (CIST), October 2025
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
**Graduate Student Senate Award** — INFORMS Annual Meeting, October 2024
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
**European Investment Bank Summer School Fellowship** — European Investment Bank (EIB), June–July 2021
:::
